title: Peucedanum nebrodense
taxonomy: Peucedanum nebrodense is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It belongs to the genus Peucedanum, which includes several species of ferns and flowering plants. Peucedanum nebrodense is native to Sicily, a region in southern Italy. The plant is further classified as a member of the order Apiales, which includes many species of flowering plants with umbrella-like inflorescences. At the rank of kingdom, Peucedanum nebrodense is classified as a Plantae.
